text: Berada jauh dr jalan raya , perlu jalan kaki naik turun bebatuan. Sekitar 1 jam jalan kaki baru sampai.j gn lupa bawa persediaan air dan makanan untuk di jalan . Kondisi air pada saat kami berkunjung airnya keruh. Menikmati bebatuan pahatan dari Alam yang sangat mengagumkan.
english_translation: Located far from the highway, it requires walking up and down rocky terrain. It takes about 1 hour of walking to arrive. Don't forget to bring water and food supplies for the journey. The water condition during our visit was murky. Enjoy the amazing natural rock carvings.
summary: Access to this remote site requires a challenging one-hour hike over rocky terrain. With no facilities available, visitors must bring their own food and water. The primary activity is viewing natural rock carvings, although a water feature at the location was observed to be murky.

text:
Tempat parkir luas, motor, helm dan mobil diparkir AMAN.
Lebih baik datang pukul 5 atau 6 sore karena lebih mudah memilih spot camping yang bagus buat foto-foto.
Malam view city light nya keren dan pagi view nya ga kalah keren.
english_translation:
Spacious parking lot, motorcycles, helmets, and cars are parked SAFELY.
It's better to come around 5 or 6 PM because it's easier to pick a good camping spot for photos.
The city light view at night is cool, and the view in the morning is no less cool.
summary: The attraction provides ample and secure parking for vehicles and is an ideal location for camping and photography. It offers impressive city light views at night and scenic morning vistas, with a late afternoon arrival recommended for securing the best camping spots.

text: sukaa banget disini.. tempatnya tenang bgt, walau awalnya jalan menuju kesini ada yg rusak parah skitar 1km (yg bannya ceper lbh baik pikir 2x) tapi pas masuk worth it bgt.. dingin, pemandangan bagus dan pulangnya menuju parkiran bisa naik free shutle car jadi ga berasa capek..
english_translation: Love it here so much. The place is very peaceful. Even though initially the road leading here was badly damaged for about 1km (those with flat tires should think twice), once you arrive, it's totally worth it. It's cool, the view is good, and on the way back to the parking lot, you can take a free shuttle car, so you don't feel tired.
summary: Access to the attraction is challenging due to a 1km stretch of poorly maintained road. However, the site offers a peaceful atmosphere with good views, and a complimentary shuttle service is provided to assist visitors with the return trip to the parking area.

text: Nuansanya sejuk. Ke tempat curug nya juga gak jauh, airnya juga bersih. Tempatnya luas, bisa buat kemping juga. Dan ada permainan flying fox nya juga buat anak anak. Tiket masuknya murah dan terjangkau. Pokoknya cocok buat obat penghilang penat😍 …
english_translation: The nuances are cool. It's not far to the waterfall, and the water is also clean. The place is spacious, suitable for camping too. And there's a flying fox game for the kids. The entrance ticket is cheap and affordable. Overall, it's perfect for relieving fatigue 😍
summary: This affordable and easily accessible attraction features a short walk to a clean waterfall. The spacious site is suitable for camping and offers activities, including a flying fox for children.

text: Tempatnya bagus.... Pemandangan indah.. Banyak spot foto... Hanya sayang tiketnya menurut saya terlalu tinggi Rp. 50.000/orang itu pun di dalamnya setiap wahana atau spot foto harus bayar lagi. Menyenangkan bagi yang punya cukup banyak uang...😊 …
english_translation: The place is nice.... Beautiful scenery.. Lots of photo spots... It's just a shame the ticket price, in my opinion, is too high at Rp. 50,000/person, and even then, every ride or photo spot inside requires an additional payment. It's fun for those who have quite a lot of money... 😊 …
summary: While the scenic attraction offers numerous photo spots and rides, visitors should be aware that the high entrance fee does not cover these activities, which all require separate additional payments.

text: Susah air buat wudhu dan anak2 setelah kotor-kotoran, bingung mau mandinya.. ga ada airnya, padahal air terjun deket
english_translation: It's difficult to get water for ablution and the children after they've gotten dirty, I'm confused about how to bathe them.. there's no water, even though there's a waterfall nearby.
summary: The location lacks essential water facilities for personal hygiene and religious ablution, which negatively impacts the experience for visitors, particularly families with children. This scarcity of water is especially notable given the site's proximity to a waterfall.

text: Poto Poto yang gentayangan di Instagram menghoda banget pengen ke sini. Pas ke sini pas pandemi..jadi leluasa. Fresh air oksigen sejuk...Playground nya juga seru. Mushola toilet nya juara 🏆 ni...klo udah ke lewat satu..ntar di depan ada. Ga pake riweuh balik lagi.gitu. Cocok buat family, keluarga atau geng... …
english_translation: The photos circulating on Instagram are very tempting, making me want to visit. I came here during the pandemic, so it was uncrowded. Fresh, cool oxygen air... The playground is also fun. The prayer room and toilets are winners 🏆... if you pass one, there's another one up ahead. No hassle going back. It's suitable for families, relatives, or groups...
summary: This family-friendly attraction features a fun playground and is well-equipped with numerous, conveniently accessible prayer rooms and toilets located throughout the site, making it easy for groups to navigate.

text:
Curug pelangi yg bener-bener ada pelanginya. Cantik banget 🥺🥺 tiketnya 20k parkir 5k
Dibawah ada toilet, mushola dan warung
Turun tangga gak kerasa. Perjalanan pulang alias naik tangganya itu mantab banget. Bikin kaki Tremor parah wkwkw
english_translation:
A rainbow waterfall that *actually* has a rainbow. So beautiful 🥺🥺 Ticket is 20k, parking is 5k
Below there are toilets, a prayer room, and a small shop.
Going down the stairs doesn't feel like anything. The trip back, meaning climbing the stairs, is amazing. Makes your legs shake badly lol
summary: The attraction is a scenic waterfall accessed via a physically demanding staircase. The site provides toilets, a prayer room, and a shop, with separate fees for entry and parking.

text: Tempat ini sebenarnya sangat indah dan alami. Tapi infrastrukturnya perlu diperbaiki. Jalan menuju ke sini cukup buruk, terutama jika Anda mengendarai sepeda motor. Juga, ada monyet di dalam tempat ini dan mereka cukup agresif, jadi berhati-hatilah dan jaga anak Anda jika Anda memilikinya.
english_translation: This place is actually very beautiful and natural. But the infrastructure needs to be improved. The road to get here is quite bad, especially if you are riding a motorcycle. Also, there are monkeys in this place and they are quite aggressive, so be careful and watch your children if you have them.
summary: The attraction is difficult to access due to poor road conditions, particularly for motorcyclists, and its on-site infrastructure is underdeveloped. Visitors must also be cautious of aggressive monkeys, which pose a safety risk, especially to children.

text:
Bunga2 nya banyak variasi dan terawat.. walaupun gak terlalu besar lokasinya tapi banyak spot foto yg bagus.. harga masuknya juga gak mahal..

Kalao lagi hujan bisa neduh sambil makan di restonya..

Yg agak kurang terawat dibagian kebun sayuran.. kalo mau petik2 sendiri tidak banyak variannya..
english_translation:
The flowers are varied and well-maintained. Although the location isn't very large, there are many good photo spots. The entrance fee is also not expensive.

If it's raining, you can take shelter and eat at the restaurant.

The vegetable garden area is a bit less maintained. If you want to pick things yourself, there aren't many varieties.
summary: This compact and affordable attraction offers well-maintained flower gardens ideal for photography and includes an on-site restaurant for shelter or dining. However, its vegetable garden is less cared for and provides limited options for self-picking.

text:
Pertama kali kesini.. jalannya luar biasa 🤣bisa bikin langsing.. pas sampe bawah beuh luar biasa 😍 tiket masuk 20 ribu per orang plus parkir 3000 ribu
Pas kesana ga ada monyet yang ganggu.. …
english_translation:
First time here.. the road was amazing 🤣 it could make you lose weight.. when I got to the bottom, wow, amazing 😍 entrance ticket is 20 thousand per person plus parking 3000 thousand
When I went there, there were no monkeys bothering...
summary: Access to this scenic attraction requires a physically challenging journey. The site charges separate fees for entrance and parking, and the visitor noted a pleasant experience without any disturbance from local monkeys.

text: tiket masuk 15k, terdapat banyak curug yang dapat dikunjungi, pada saat musim hujan airnya agak keruh
english_translation: Entrance fee 15k, there are many waterfalls to visit, during the rainy season the water is a bit murky
summary: For a 15k admission fee, visitors can explore numerous waterfalls, although the water tends to be murky during the rainy season.

text: Adem, tiketnya masih terjangkau, bunga bunga nya bagus, sayang sekali pas beli nasi goreng dan mie tektek difoodcourt "DAPUR IBU", rasa makanannya kurang enak.. harganya range 30-40rb sudah pajak.. ga worth..
english_translation: The ticket price is still affordable, the flowers are nice. It's a shame that when I bought fried rice and mie tektek at the food court "DAPUR IBU," the food didn't taste good. The price was around 30-40rb including tax... not worth it.
summary: The attraction offers affordable admission and pleasant floral scenery, but its on-site food court is noted for serving poor-quality, overpriced meals.

text: Tmptnya ok ... Pa LG bwt yg LG .... Kesemsem.....
english_translation: The place is okay... What else for the one that is... Smitten.....
summary: The review offers a vague, subjective opinion of the attraction but provides no specific details regarding its accessibility, facilities, or activities.

text: Pemandangannya indah banget... Banyak spot spot foto kayak berasa keliling dunia...mba mba dan mas masnya ramah dn dengan senang hati mau motoin kita.. keren lah..sayang belum semua jadi bngunannya..mungkin nanti.bakal lebih meriah dan bnyak lagi spot fotonya
english_translation: The view is really beautiful... Lots of photo spots, it feels like traveling around the world... The ladies and gentlemen there are friendly and happy to take photos for us... it's cool... It's a shame not all the buildings are finished yet... maybe later it will be more festive and have even more photo spots.
summary: This tourist site offers excellent photo opportunities with diverse, scenic backdrops and friendly staff available to help take pictures. A key consideration is that the location is not yet fully completed, with some construction still in progress.

text: Datanglah pagi2 segar, adem, dan masih sepi. Mushollanya bagus, bagus dan unik. Desain mushollanya suka deh. Untuk duduk2 maupun main nyaman dan seru. Ada juga panggung untuk acara ttt. Panggung yg kl dpake serasa lg manggung ditengah hutan yg rapi. Tpt kelincinya juga bersih ada keran u tpt cuci tangan.
english_translation: Come early morning, it's fresh, cool, and still quiet. The prayer room is nice, good, and unique. I really like the prayer room's design. It's comfortable and fun for sitting around or playing. There's also a stage for events. When used, the stage feels like you're performing in the middle of a neat forest. The rabbit enclosure is also clean, with a faucet for handwashing.
summary: This attraction features a uniquely designed and comfortable prayer room, an event stage with a natural forest ambiance, and a clean rabbit enclosure with handwashing facilities, making it suitable for relaxation, play, and performances.

text: Telah bermalam di sini pada tahun 1995, tahun lalu. 2001 dengan ozog gubrag, pupuk olegun!! Hahaha... sayang bukan era digital... dokumentasi selebihnya dari tahun 1998!! Dahulu masih banyak monyet... di pagi hari" berkerumun di sisi tenda! Bangun dari tidur dengan tenda terbuka ke mata monyet...!!! Hahaha
english_translation: Stayed here in 1995, last year. 2001 with ozog gubrag, olegun fertilizer!! Hahaha... too bad it wasn't the digital era... the rest of the documentation is from 1998!! There used to be a lot of monkeys... in the morning, crowding the side of the tent! Waking up from sleep with the tent open to monkey eyes...!!! Hahaha
summary: Based on a past visit, the site provided camping facilities and was characterized by an abundance of monkeys that would approach the tents in the morning.

text: Bagus untuk destinasi keluarga di hari libur tanpa harus menanjak najak lagi karena mobil sudah bisa masuk ke tempat destinasinya pemandangannya juga cantiikkk kaya pengunjungnyaaaa
english_translation: Great for a family holiday destination without having to climb anymore because cars can already enter the destination. The scenery is also beautiful, just like the visitors!
summary: This family-friendly destination offers beautiful scenery and is easily accessible by vehicle, eliminating any need for climbing.

text:
Destinasi wisata yang cocok bersama keluarga tempat yang menjadi pilihan di Kab. Bandung Barat.
Noted;
Saran bagi pengelola Managemen GC kiranya kebersihan Toilet/WC harus lebih diutamakan agar menjadi perhatian.
Dijaga dan dirawat supaya meninggalkan kesan baik
english_translation:
Suitable tourist destinations with family in West Bandung Regency.
Noted:
Advice for the GC Management, toilet cleanliness should be prioritized to be given attention.
Maintain and care for it so that it leaves a good impression.
summary: This family-friendly tourist destination in West Bandung Regency is noted to have toilet facilities that require significant improvement in cleanliness and maintenance.

text: Curug yang Eksotis, se Eksotis nanjak nya. Cocok juga untuk yang suka Hiking dikarenakan jalan nanjak se nanjak gunung Everest.
english_translation: Exotic Waterfall, as exotic as the climb. Also suitable for those who like hiking because the uphill path is as steep as Mount Everest.
summary: The Exotic Waterfall is reached via a strenuous and steep uphill hike, making it a suitable attraction for visitors seeking a challenging trekking experience.

text: Tempatnya bagus sayang gk ngajak anak sama istri, pemandangannya bagus hamparan hijau dimana mana ada bukit hijau juga, di tambah udara nya yang sejuk, ada kolam berenangnya juga, ada danau juga dan bisa naik bebek2 an. Semoga bisa ajak anak dan istri saya kembali lagi kesama
english_translation: The place is nice, darling, too bad you didn't bring the kids and wife. The view is good, a vast expanse of green everywhere, with green hills too. Added to that is the cool air, there's also a swimming pool and a lake where you can ride pedal boats. Hopefully, I can bring my children and wife back again.
summary: This scenic, family-friendly destination offers key facilities such as a swimming pool and a lake where visitors can enjoy pedal boat rides.

text: Kalo pagi2 sekitar jam 6an kesana, kita berasa di atas awan trus bisa liat sunrise.
english_translation: If you go there in the morning around 6 o'clock, you'll feel like you're above the clouds and can see the sunrise.
summary: The site's main activity is sunrise viewing, which is accessible around 6 AM and offers a unique perspective from what feels like above the clouds.

text: Benar-benar masih asri, banyak pohon, jalan serapaknya juga sangat rapi menurut saya, banyak monyet dan juga suara serangga, sayang ya curug dan  sungainya penuh sampah dan air berwarna keruh kecoklatan, sangat disayangkan bisa rusak seperti itu.. ayo mulai jgn buang sampah ke sungai guys 🙏🙏🙏 …
english_translation: Truly still pristine, lots of trees, the walking paths are also very neat in my opinion, lots of monkeys and also insect sounds. It's a shame that the waterfall and the river are full of trash and the water is murky brownish, it's a great pity it could be damaged like that. Let's start, don't throw trash into the river guys 🙏🙏🙏...
summary: This natural attraction features well-maintained walking paths suitable for enjoying its pristine environment, which includes abundant trees and wildlife like monkeys. However, the site's waterfall and river are heavily polluted with trash and murky water, diminishing the overall experience.

text: Artistik tempatnya, bagus buat hunting foto2 cantik... tapi blum terlalu banyak pilihan makanan nya dan fasilitas yg ditawarkan masi kurang menarik
english_translation: Artistic place, good for taking beautiful photos... but not too many food options yet and the facilities offered are still less appealing.
summary: This artistic attraction is excellent for photography, though its facilities and dining options are currently limited and underdeveloped.

text: Pemandangan indah, terletak tidak begitu jauh dari Alun-Alun Lembang, jalur yang terang, layanan yang cukup bagus dari penjaga setempat. Biaya masuk Rp 52k untuk dua orang & dua sepeda motor. Tapi tidak ada air yang mengalir meskipun ada beberapa toilet umum, tetapi tangki airnya kosong
english_translation: Beautiful view, located not too far from Lembang Square, the path is clear, pretty good service from the local guards. Entrance fee Rp 52k for two people & two motorcycles. But there is no running water even though there are some public toilets, but the water tanks are empty
summary: This conveniently located attraction features clear pathways and helpful staff, though an entrance fee is required. While public toilets are available, they are non-functional due to a lack of running water.

text: Akses menuju curug ini masih sangat susah, belum ada tangga yang aman bagi anak-anak. Sangat tidak disarankan ke Curug ini saat hujan. Namun yang terbaik dari curug ini adalah banyaknya batu-batu kecil di sekitar aliran curug yang berguna bagi anda yang ingin merasakan kesejukan air curug tanpa harus berbasah-basah.
english_translation: Access to this waterfall is still very difficult, there are no safe stairs for children. It is highly not recommended to visit this waterfall during rain. However, the best thing about this waterfall is the abundance of small rocks around the waterfall's flow, which are useful for those who want to feel the coolness of the waterfall's water without getting wet.
summary: The waterfall has poor and unsafe access, lacking safe stairs and being particularly hazardous during rain. A key feature is the surrounding rocks, which provide an opportunity for visitors to enjoy the coolness of the water without getting wet.

text: Adem bngt udaranya nyaman bersih pas buat yg bln madu
english_translation: The air is really nice and comfortable, perfect for honeymoons.
summary: The attraction provides a pleasant atmosphere, making it suitable for romantic activities like honeymoons, but no information regarding accessibility or other facilities is mentioned.

text: Temoatnya bagus, view nya menarik, dikasih free minum, dan bisa naik sepedah disana, spot foto yang menarik, hanya saja tempat belum tertata rapih sepenuhnya tetapi overall great place disana.. Recomended buat tempat bermain bersama keluarga
english_translation: The atmosphere is good, the view is attractive, they give free drinks, and you can ride a bicycle there. It's an interesting photo spot. It's just that the place isn't fully organized yet, but overall it's a great place to be. Recommended for a place to play with family.
summary: This family-friendly attraction offers activities like bicycling and photography, along with complimentary drinks, although it is not yet fully organized.

text: Tempatnya bagus dan cukup luas cuma beberapa tempat dibatasi dan harus bayar kembali. Harga tiket masuk Rp. 20000,-. Variasi makanan cukup banyak dan terjangkau untuk harga sekelas tempat wisata namun membeli harus menggunakan koin yang bisa ditukarkan disana. Membeli koin secukupnya saja karena tidak dapat diuangkan kembali
english_translation: The place is nice and quite spacious, but some areas are restricted and require an additional payment. The entrance fee is Rp. 20,000. There's a good variety of food and it's reasonably priced for a tourist spot, but you have to buy it using coins that can be exchanged there. Only buy enough coins as needed because they are non-refundable.
summary: This attraction charges a Rp. 20,000 entrance fee, with certain spacious areas requiring an additional payment for access. It offers a variety of reasonably priced food, which must be purchased using a special, non-refundable coin system available on-site.

text: Taman Bunga Begonia ini sebetulnya memiliki kawasan yang tidak begitu luas namun ditata agar dapat dinikmati pemandangannya sebagai tempat untuk selfie bersama pasangan, teman dan keluarga. disarankan tidak datang pada weekend karena arus lalu lintas menuju lembang selalu padat pada saat weekend atau liburan.
english_translation: This Begonia Flower Garden is not very large, but it is arranged to be enjoyed for its scenery, making it a good spot for selfies with your partner, friends, and family. It is advised not to visit on weekends because traffic towards Lembang is always heavy on weekends or holidays.
summary: This small, scenic garden is well-suited for photography, though its accessibility is significantly impacted by heavy weekend and holiday traffic in the Lembang area.

text: Suasananya sangat sejuk dan cocok untuk berbagai kalangan. Bagi yang memakai kursi roda atau stroller juga sangat aman karena jalannya dibuat halus namun harus diperhatikan ketika jalanan naik ataupun turun. Tempatnya sangat luas untuk dijelajahi. Jangan lupa bawa air minum agar tidak dehidrasi.
english_translation: The atmosphere is very pleasant and suitable for all ages. It is very safe for wheelchair users or those with strollers because the paths are made smooth, but caution is advised on uphill or downhill sections. The place is very spacious to explore. Don't forget to bring water so you don't get dehydrated.
summary: This spacious attraction offers smooth, accessible paths suitable for exploration by wheelchair and stroller users, though caution is recommended on sloped areas. Visitors are advised to bring their own water for hydration.

text: Asyik banget kalau yang mau cari tempat lega buat ngadem di kala pandemi kaya gini.. tempatnya lega.. bisa ngadem di danau atau ditamannya.. maenan sedikit tp no problem.. anak2 bisa lari2 bebas aja udh happy..
english_translation: It's so fun if you're looking for a spacious place to cool off during a pandemic like this. The place is spacious; you can chill by the lake or in the garden. Not many toys, but no problem; kids are happy just being able to run around freely.
summary: This spacious attraction features a lake and a garden, offering ample room for relaxation. While it has limited play equipment, its open areas are suitable for children to run and play freely.

text: akses gampang dan bagus.ga ngebosenin.tracking utk pmula.scenenya ok banget lah
english_translation: Easy and good access. Not boring. Tracking for beginners. The scenery is really great.
summary: This easily accessible attraction offers engaging, beginner-friendly trekking trails complemented by excellent scenery.

text:
Pembelian tiket langsung di jalanan saat mau parkir, jadi tidak ada loket khusus. Kondisi ramai Krn tanggal merah, makanan enak, uang dtukar koin untuk transaksi, unik juga.
Banyak makanan tradisional yang disajikan. Banyak wahana2 permainan. Cocok untuk keluarga.
english_translation:
Tickets are bought directly on the street when you want to park, so there are no special ticket booths. It was crowded because it was a public holiday. The food was delicious, and money is exchanged for coins for transactions, which is also unique.
Many traditional foods are served. There are many amusement rides. Suitable for families.
summary: This family-friendly attraction offers amusement rides and a variety of traditional foods. Access is managed through on-street ticket sales for parking, as there are no dedicated booths. The site uses a unique coin-based system for transactions and can become very crowded, especially on public holidays.

text: Lokasi cukup luas, banyak spot foto. Tiket masuk 20 rb gratis minuman. kemaren dari pagi sampai siang jam 11 an blm selesai keliling ke semua lokasi floating lembang ini. Next pasti ke bandung lagi.
english_translation: The location is quite spacious, with many photo spots. The entrance ticket is 20,000 Indonesian Rupiah which includes a free drink. Yesterday, we were there from morning until around 11 AM and still hadn't finished exploring all the locations at Floating Lembang. Next time, we will definitely come to Bandung again.
summary: This spacious attraction offers numerous photo opportunities and is extensive enough to require several hours to explore fully. The 20,000 Indonesian Rupiah entrance fee includes a complimentary drink.

text: Puncaknya lembang, jalanan naik turun cuaca sejuk dingin tp saat ksna kawah sdng aktif jd disarankan memakai masker krn bau blerang menyengat. But semua aman, wisata alam betapa indahnya ciptaan-Mu. Bisa foto dari atas dgn jalur yg sudah disediakan dan ada spot foto lainnya. Cocok bgt buat merefresh sejenak
english_translation: The peak of the plateau, roads go up and down, the weather is cool and cold, but when you get there, the crater is active so it's recommended to wear a mask because the sulfur smell is pungent. But everything is safe, nature tourism, how beautiful is Your creation. You can take photos from above with the provided path and there are other photo spots. Very suitable for a refreshing break.
summary: This nature attraction, located on a plateau peak accessible via hilly roads, features an active sulfur crater with a strong odor, making a mask advisable for visitors. The site is considered safe and provides a designated path and various photo spots for sightseeing and photography.

text: Pengalaman bagi yang akan berkunjung agar berhati hati nanti ada pemaksaan parkir mobil tdk resmi oleh masyarakat dengan alasan parkir penuh padahal tempat parkir lokasi masih luas,  jadi mohon pengelola agar diperhatikan spy pengunjung nyaman
english_translation: An experience for those who will visit, be careful, there will be unofficial forced car parking by the community under the pretext of full parking, even though the parking lot is still spacious. Therefore, the management is requested to pay attention so that visitors are comfortable.
summary: The review highlights an accessibility issue, warning visitors about unofficial parking attendants who may falsely claim the spacious official lot is full to direct them elsewhere.

text:
Suka dengan tempat ini
Bersih dan rapi
Asyik bersama keluarga
english_translation:
Love this place
Clean and tidy
Fun with family
summary: This clean and well-maintained attraction offers an enjoyable experience suitable for families.

text: Sebelum viral tempat ini sangat bagus, tapi setelah banyak yang datang dan kurang peduli pada lingkungan jadi kurang bagus.
english_translation: Before it went viral, this place was great, but after many people came and cared less about the environment, it became less good.
summary: This review indicates the attraction has experienced a significant increase in visitor traffic, leading to environmental degradation and a decline in its overall quality. The text provides no specific details regarding the site's facilities or available activities.

text:
Tempatnya rekomen bgt buat acara keluarga mau camp ataupun hy skdr botram
Cm jalannya saja dr dusun bambu ke gerbang tiket curug layungnya yaa bs dibilang kurang bagus
Untuk tiketnya masih terbilang murah lah..
Fasilitas lengkap..
Toilet mushola dan warkop ada
Lahan parkir luas...
english_translation:
The place is highly recommended for family events, whether camping or just a picnic.
Only the road from Dusun Bambu to the Curug Layung ticket gate is, you could say, not very good.
The ticket price is still considered cheap.
Facilities are complete.
Toilets, prayer rooms, and coffee stalls are available.
Spacious parking lot.
summary: This family-friendly attraction is well-suited for activities like camping and picnics, offering a complete range of facilities including toilets, prayer rooms, food stalls, and a large parking area. However, the road leading to the site is in poor condition.

text: Waktu kesini lagi berkabut jadi ngga bisa nikmatin banget. Tiket masuk per orang 20rb, tiket masuk mobil 15rb, parkir 5rb. Udaranya seger bau-bau belerang gitu
english_translation: It was foggy when I came here, so I couldn't enjoy it much. The entrance fee is 20,000 IDR per person, 15,000 IDR per car, and parking is 5,000 IDR. The air is fresh with a sulfur smell.
summary: The attraction is accessible by car and provides parking, though it charges separate fees for per-person entrance, vehicle entry, and parking. The site offers an outdoor experience in a natural environment characterized by fresh air and a distinct sulfur smell.

text: Tempat wisata yg bagus , bersih , menyenangkan 🥰 ada banyak spot poto juga tempat2 yg unik 😘 puas lah main2 kesini cocok dengan segala umur dan acara 😎 jika mau makan kita bisa menyeberang naik perahu , pembayaran menggunakan koin khusus yg sudah kita tukar kan dng mata uang kita ☺️ seruuu …
english_translation: A great tourist spot, clean, and enjoyable 🥰. There are many photo spots and unique places too 😘. Satisfied with playing here, suitable for all ages and occasions 😎. If you want to eat, we can cross by boat. Payment uses special coins that we exchange with our currency ☺️. So much fun…
summary: This clean and enjoyable attraction is suitable for all ages, offering numerous unique photo opportunities and recreational activities. Dining facilities are accessible via a boat trip, and on-site payments are made using special coins that must be exchanged from currency.

text:
Area wisata tertata rapih, cukup bersih, area parkir banyak, tiket masuk tidak terlalu mahal.

Banyak pedagang yg jadi lokal guide dan fotografer - sehingga cukup membantu menemukan spot foto terbaik. Dan kehadiran mereka tidak memaksa utk membeli
english_translation:
The tourist area is well-organized, quite clean, with ample parking. The entrance fee is not too expensive.

Many vendors offer their services as local guides and photographers, which greatly helps in finding the best photo spots. Their presence is not pushy for purchases.
summary: This well-organized and clean tourist attraction is accessible, with ample parking and an affordable entrance fee. For activities, visitors can hire non-pushy local guides and photographers to help locate the best photo spots.

text: Masya Allah... Cakep banget pemandangan nya. Pas di pintu gerbang ngerasa kaya mau masuk ke Jurassic Park. Yang menantang buat jompo belia kaya saya ya jalan kaki yang lumayan jauh. Tapi worth it. Pemandangan bagus, adem, sejuk, asri. Btw enak ya ditempat dingin, kelayapan seharian juga ga bikin keringetan.
english_translation: Masya Allah... the view is so beautiful. At the gate, I felt like I was entering Jurassic Park. The challenging part for an "elderly youth" like me is the rather long walk. But it's worth it. The view is good, it's cool, refreshing, and green. By the way, it's nice in a cold place; roaming around all day doesn't make you sweat.
summary: This scenic attraction requires a significant amount of walking, which may be challenging for some, but offers rewarding views in a cool, refreshing climate that makes exploring on foot pleasant.

text: masuknya 25rb, tamannya ga terlalu luas tp ditata dengan sangat rapi. waktu kesana ada keluarga yg lagi gathering dan suasananya bagus bgt. parkir motor 2rb dan pas masuk kita bisa pake topi bambu buat foto foto. topinya gratis dipakai selama di dalam wisata. ibu penjaga tiketnya ramah sekali jadi merasa sangat disambut
english_translation: Entrance fee is 25,000 IDR. The park isn't very large, but it's very neatly arranged. When I visited, there was a family having a gathering, and the atmosphere was really nice. Motorcycle parking is 2,000 IDR. Upon entering, you can use bamboo hats for photos. The hats are free to use within the tourist area. The ticket attendant was very friendly, so I felt very welcomed.
summary: This small, well-organized park charges a 25,000 IDR entrance fee and a 2,000 IDR fee for motorcycle parking. The site offers complimentary bamboo hats for photos and is a welcoming venue suitable for family gatherings.

text: Buat yg ma ke SANGHYANG HELEEUT, harus pas musim kemarau, jangan pas musim hujan, karena kalau musim hujan, airnya pasti keruh. Dan siapkan mental fisik, karena perjalanan menuju lokasi -+ 1 jam
english_translation: For those who want to go to SANGHYANG HELEEUT, it must be during the dry season, not the rainy season, because if it's the rainy season, the water will definitely be murky. And prepare mentally and physically, because the journey to the location is about 1 hour.
summary: Accessing Sanghyang Heleut involves a physically demanding one-hour journey. For optimal water clarity, a visit is recommended during the dry season, as the water becomes murky in the rainy season.

text: keren tempat y...buat Mangement Orchid coba klo ada kopi buat kami2 driver Traveloka lebih keren bangeeettt
english_translation: Cool place, y... For Orchid Management, if you had coffee for us Traveloka drivers, it would be even cooler!
summary: A driver for a travel service indicates the attraction is accessible but suggests its facilities could be improved by adding a coffee service for drivers.

text:
Bagus tempatnya..
Tapi buset deh pop mie beli di dalem harganya 18.000, pop mienya ada lapisan emasnya kali ya... perasaan pop mienya sama air panasnya juga sama, apa jangan2 air panasnya dimasak di neraka ?, gilak kali, udah bayar tiket masuk jajanan harganya selangit, mikir2 deh kalo mo jajan disitu !
english_translation:
The place is nice...
But wow, the Pop Mie bought inside costs 18,000, maybe the Pop Mie has a layer of gold on it... I feel like the Pop Mie and the hot water are the same, or maybe the hot water was cooked in hell? Crazy, you've already paid for the entrance ticket and the snacks are outrageously priced, think twice if you want to snack there!
summary: This tourist attraction requires an entrance fee and provides on-site food facilities, though the reviewer warns that snacks sold within the venue are extremely overpriced.

text: Pemandangannya seperti danau biasa tetapi bagian terbaiknya adalah ketika Anda bisa melakukan lompat tebing, harganya terlalu mahal terutama ketika Anda pertama kali pergi ke sini. Saya sarankan Anda membawa teman yang tahu tempat danau suci sehingga Anda tidak perlu menggunakan pemandu
english_translation: The scenery is like a regular lake, but the best part is when you can cliff dive. It's too expensive, especially when you go here for the first time. I suggest you bring a friend who knows the sacred lake spot so you don't have to use a guide.
summary: The site's main activity is cliff diving, but it is considered expensive. To mitigate costs, visitors can navigate the area with a knowledgeable friend instead of hiring a guide.

text: Tempatnya cukup luas. Hanya perlu beberapa jam untuk eksplorasi seluruh bagian. Banyak bagian yg exclude dari tiket masuk. Bunganya cantik dan terawat. Makanannya enak, booth coin mudah diakses. Harga makanan rata ±25k (berat) dan ±15k (ringan). Perahu variatif bentuknya. Banyak spot foto di seluruh bagian
english_translation: The place is quite spacious. It only takes a few hours to explore the entire area. Many sections are excluded from the entrance ticket. The flowers are beautiful and well-maintained. The food is delicious, and the coin booths are easily accessible. Food prices are around ±25k (heavy) and ±15k (light). The boats come in various shapes. There are many photo spots throughout the area.
summary: This attraction can be explored within a few hours and offers activities such as admiring well-maintained flower gardens, taking photos at numerous spots, and enjoying various boat rides. Food facilities are easily accessible and affordably priced. A key accessibility detail is that the main entrance ticket does not include access to all sections of the site.
